clusters.headline: Australia confirms first case of H5N1 bird flu as virus reaches every continent
clusters.summary: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.

clusters.headline: Boy, 12, wins hearts after trying to check sick chicken into Ethiopian hospital
clusters.summary: Markos's beloved hen was not responding to any treatments - so he did the only thing he could think of.

clusters.headline: Six-year-old Ebola patient taken from DR Congo hospital found and 'doing well'
clusters.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.

clusters.headline: Palestinians in Gaza say bank account closures cut off access to vital funds
clusters.summary:
Palestinians in Gaza say bank account closures cut off access to vital funds

clusters.headline: Israeli strikes kill four in Gaza City and several in southern Lebanon
clusters.summary:
Israeli strikes kill four in Gaza City and several in southern Lebanon

clusters.headline: Family of four killed in Israeli strike on southern Lebanon
clusters.summary:
Family of four killed in Israeli strike on southern Lebanon 

    
    

        
    
                An Israeli attack on the village of Barish in southern Lebanon killed four members of the same family, according to Lebanon's National News Agency.

The attack came just one day

clusters.headline: Zimbabwe MPs pass bill to extend president's time in power
clusters.summary: The proposal would extend Emmerson Mnangagwa's term by two years and scrap direct presidential elections.

clusters.headline: Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi to stand trial for rape
clusters.summary: French prosecutors confirm Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi will stand trial for rape, in accusations dating back to 2023.

clusters.headline: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
clusters.summary: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

clusters.headline: Kenya: Fabricated Quote Used to Claim Trump Warned Kenyan President Ruto Over 'Oppressing Kenyans' At G7 Summit
clusters.summary: [Africa Check] Fabricated quote used to claim Trump warned Kenyan president Ruto over 'oppressing Kenyans' at G7 summit

clusters.headline: Nigeria: Nigeria's Ruling Party Has Not Released Final List of Senatorial Candidates for 2027 Elections
clusters.summary: [Africa Check] Nigeria's ruling party has not released final list of senatorial candidates for 2027 elections

clusters.headline: Labour's Andy Burnham wins a special election, setting up a showdown with Starmer to lead Britain
clusters.summary: Labour's Andy Burnham, the current mayor of Greater Manchester, has won a special election for a seat in Parliament that puts him in a position to challenge embattled Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the country.
